payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a memory. Please provide a specific fact, preference, project, or goal related to AI that you want me to remember.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and does not provide a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, or instruction to remember.

details: No durable memory was created because the input was overly broad: "Remember everything about AI".

repair_options: Specify a personal AI-related preference, e.g., "Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts."
Specify an ongoing project, e.g., "Remember that I am building an AI chatbot for customer support."
Specify a learning goal, e.g., "Remember that I want to learn about reinforcement learning."
Specify a recurring instruction, e.g., "Remember to explain AI topics with practical examples."
